TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_cenhu_micuzuh_tu_midiputay_tu_mulaay, title = cenhu_micuzuh_tu_midiputay_tu_mulaay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/cenhu_micuzuh_tu_midiputay_tu_mulaay} }

S.FORM: == tatangahan == micuzuh tu midiputay tu mulaay kakiliman cenhu micuzuh tu midiputay tu mulaay, miwada' tu ba'ketay nu i luma'ay, nika pasebengay a tademaw ci Can cy wen atu ci Lin ya bang a tademaw nacila patahkal musakamu tu nikinsaan, sakalah sa ku
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan == mi ¶uzuńß tu midiputaj tu mur~…ĺaaj kakir~…ĺiman ¶…ônńßu mi ¶uzuńß tu midiputaj tu mur~…ĺaaj, miwada Ē~ ° tu ba Ē~ °k…ôtaj nu i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj, nika pas…ôb…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶an ¶j w…ôn atu ¶i r~…ĺin ja baŇč a tad…ômaw na ¶ir~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ musakamu tu nikinsaan, sakar~…ĺańß sa ku
S.FORM: == tatangahan == micuzuh tu midiputay tu mulaay kakiliman cenhu micuzuh tu midiputay tu mulaay, miwada' tu ba'ketay nu i luma'ay, nika pasebengay a tademaw ci Can cy wen atu ci Lin ya bang a tademaw nacila patahkal musakamu tu nikinsaan, sakalah sa ku
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan == mi ¶uzuńß tu midiputaj tu mur~…ĺaaj kakir~…ĺiman ¶…ônńßu mi ¶uzuńß tu midiputaj tu mur~…ĺaaj, miwada Ē~ ° tu ba Ē~ °k…ôtaj nu i r~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj, nika pas…ôb…ôŇčaj a tad…ômaw ¶i ¶an ¶j w…ôn atu ¶i r~…ĺin ja baŇč a tad…ômaw na ¶ir~…ĺa patańßkar~…ĺ musakamu tu nikinsaan, sakar~…ĺańß sa ku
